reviews.comment: I really feel you need to level of the staff, specially your marketing team and your manager. They lack on speaking skills when it comes to handling customers. Since the last one week we are trying to conceptualise an event I was approached by your marketing team and we were discussing about an event and nothing has happened so far. It’s been a week. Nobody call back nobody response and then I get a message that the entire staff is busy with the launch in Mumbai, so it is going to take time. Please go ahead and do the event somewhere. This is how people lose on business.

reviews.comment:
We came for second and this time with kids, just to have horrible experience.
After waiting for 30min we were told that Asian chicken rice bowl is not available. We ordered hot choclate and at first served iced hazelnut. Ordered 2 portion of toasties and were told in 1 plate 2 toasties mean 2 portion after confrontation we were served 2nd plate.
Disappointed will not recommend. Also when you pay 1800 you expect order to be served correct and on time.
When all restaurant and cafe's are full on 14th Feb this one you will find empty. Something is wrong.

reviewReply.comment:
Dear Abhinav,

We’re truly sorry to read about your experience, especially since this was your second visit and you were dining with your children. That makes it even more disappointing to hear that we fell short.

Waiting 30 minutes to be informed about item unavailability, confusion around portioning, and delays in serving are not the standards we aim to uphold. We completely understand your frustration, particularly when expectations are higher for a family outing and when you’ve chosen to spend your time and money with us.

Your feedback has been shared with the outlet team for immediate review of service coordination, menu availability communication, and order accuracy. This is not the experience we want any guest to have.

If you’re open to it, we would really value the opportunity to understand more about your visit and address this personally. Please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you directly.

Thank you for taking the time to share this. We are listening.
Team Coffee Island
